Thor: Love and Thunder (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $343,256,830Details
International Box Office $417,671,251
Worldwide Box Office $760,928,081
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,292,362
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,573,066
Total $19,865,428
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The God of Thunder is on a journey unlike anything he’s ever faced—a quest for inner peace. But Thor’s retirement is interrupted by a galactic killer known as Gorr the God Butcher, who seeks the extinction of the gods. To combat the threat, Thor enlists the help of King Valkyrie, Korg and ex-girlfriend Jane Foster, who—to Thor’s surprise—inexplicably wields his magical hammer, Mjolnir, as The Mighty Thor. Together, they embark upon a harrowing cosmic adventure to uncover the mystery of the God Butcher’s vengeance and stop him before it’s too late.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$144,165,107 (42.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$250,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,375 opening theaters/4,375 max. theaters, 7.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $389,871,960

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 8th, 2022 (Wide) by Walt Disney
July 8th, 2022 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: July 1st, 2022 (Wide), released as Thor: Aşk ve Gök Gürültüsü (Turkey)
July 1st, 2022 (Wide) (Finland)
July 6th, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
July 6th, 2022 (Wide) (Switzerland)
July 6th, 2022 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: September 8th, 2022 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of sci-fi violence and action, language, some suggestive material and partial nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2736 (cert #53840), 6/15/2022)
Running Time: 119 minutes
Franchise: Marvel Cinematic Universe, Thor
Plot point: Exes in Love, Gods and Goddesses, Revenge
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Marvel Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

The God of Thunder is on a journey unlike anything he’s ever faced—a quest for inner peace. But Thor’s retirement is interrupted by a galactic killer known as Gorr the God Butcher, who seeks the extinction of the gods. To combat the threat, Thor enlists the help of King Valkyrie, Korg and ex-girlfriend Jane Foster, who—to Thor’s surprise—inexplicably wields his magical hammer, Mjolnir, as The Mighty Thor. Together, they embark upon a harrowing cosmic adventure to uncover the mystery of the God Butcher’s vengeance and stop him before it’s too late.
